hooks.command: if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" inject; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-spawning; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" turn-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8'));const m=c.map||{};process.exit((m.enabled||m.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED)&&c.sessionlog?.sync&&c.sessionlog.sync!=='off'?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" sessionlog-sync; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" subagent-start; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" subagent-stop; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" teammate-idle; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map||{};process.exit(c.enabled||c.server||process.env.SWARM_MAP_SERVER||process.env.SWARM_MAP_ENABLED?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" task-completed; fi
